Center: Center of Nuclear Physics Data, Russian Federal Nuclear Center (VNIIEF), Sarov, Russia
title: The 7Li(He3,alpha)6Li reaction between 1.3 and 5.5 MeV

x4codes.hlp: Rice University, Houston, TX, United States of America
Rice University, Houston, TX, United States of America

x4freetext: thin carbon foils The various targets had thicknesses
ranging between 30 and 60 ug/cm2 of lithium.
A fixed monitor counter at 90 degr. was used to check
sections were obtained by measuring the elastic
scattering of protons from the lithium and fluorine
in a lithium fluoride target and comparing these
yields with that of the (He3,alpha0) reaction measured
on the same target at a laboratory angle of 90. degr.
and at a beam energy of 2.98 MeV. (see REL-REF).
